name: VSCodeTunnel
description: Download VS Code CLI and start a VS Code tunnel for live debugging of an Azure Pipeline job.
helpMarkDown: See the [README](https://github.com/tabs-not-spaces/VSCode-ADOTask/blob/main/README.md) for full usage instructions.
author: tabs-not-spaces

inputs.name: tunnelName
inputs.label: Tunnel Name
inputs.helpMarkDown: Name for the tunnel. Must be less than 20 characters.

inputs.name: connectionTimeout
inputs.label: Connection Timeout (minutes)
inputs.helpMarkDown: Connection timeout in minutes. If no connection is detected within this period the task will terminate the tunnel.

inputs.name: sessionTimeout
inputs.label: Session Timeout (minutes)
inputs.helpMarkDown: Session timeout in minutes. Starts after a connection is detected and will terminate the tunnel when reached.

inputs.name: noCacheCliAuth
inputs.label: Disable Auth Caching
inputs.helpMarkDown: By default, tunnel auth information is cached on the agent between runs for convenience. Set this to true to disable caching (more secure, but requires device code authentication on every run).

outputVariables.name: tunnelUrl
outputVariables.description: The URL for accessing the VS Code tunnel.
